# ChinaTripBox

> Practical China travel planning guides and tools for foreign visitors, focused on payments, eSIMs, transport, apps, first-day setup, city planning, and everyday travel logistics.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.chinatripbox.com/)
- [Resources](https://www.chinatripbox.com/resources/)
- [Trip Planner](https://www.chinatripbox.com/trip-planner/)

- [eSIM Hub](https://www.chinatripbox.com/esim/)
- [Transport Hub](https://www.chinatripbox.com/transport/)

## Featured Guides
- [China Tourist Visa (L Visa) Application Guide 2026: Step by Step for US, UK, Canada, Australia & More](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-tourist-visa-application-guide-2026/): Complete 2026 guide to applying for a Chinese tourist visa — who needs one, documents required, application process, fees, processing times at Chinese visa centers worldwide, and how to avoid common rejection reasons.
- [China Food Guide for Foreigners 2026: Regional Dishes, How to Order &...](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-food-guide-regional-foreigners/): Explore China’s regional dishes, order with confidence, and enjoy practical dining tips, food safety advice, and useful phrases for travelers.
- [Alipay vs WeChat Pay for Foreigners 2026: Which Payment App Should You Use?](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/alipay-vs-wechat-pay-foreigners/): Compare Alipay and WeChat Pay for your China trip in 2026 — setup difficulty, card support, fees, and which one works best for tourists, with step-by-step setup instructions.
- [Do You Need a VPN in China 2026? Tourist Internet Guide](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/do-you-need-a-vpn-in-china-2026/): Do tourists still need a VPN in China in 2026? Practical guide to internet access, blocked apps, working VPNs, and eSIM options that bypass censorship for foreign visitors.
- [First 24 Hours in China 2026: Complete Arrival Checklist for Foreign...](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/first-24-hours-in-china-arrival-checklist/): Navigate your first 24 hours in China with a simple arrival checklist covering airport steps, internet, Alipay, Didi, and hotel transfer.
- [China Trip Planner 2026: Payment, eSIM, Transport and Apps for...](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-trip-planner-first-time-visitors-payment-esim-transport-apps/): Complete China trip planner for first-time visitors in 2026 — what to set up before departure: payments, eSIM, transport apps, packing checklist, and a 24-hour arrival plan.
- [China Visa-Free Entry and Transit 2026: Do You Need a Visa?](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-visa-free-entry-transit-guide-2026/): Check China visa-free entry and 240-hour transit rules for 2026, with clear guidance on eligibility, documents, and when you need a visa.
- [How to Pay in China 2026: Alipay, WeChat Pay and Cash Ranked](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/how-to-pay-in-china-tourist-guide/): Three ways to pay in China as a tourist. Alipay works everywhere, credit cards work at hotels, cash is backup. Here is exactly which method to use at each type of store.
- [Which eSIM Works in China Without a VPN? 2026 Comparison Guide (Airalo,...](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/best-esim-for-china-travel-2026/): Compare China eSIMs for 2026, including Airalo, Holafly, and Nomad, to see which work without a VPN for Google, WhatsApp, and more.

## Latest Guides
- [Best China eSIM for iPhone Users 2026: Tested and Compared](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/best-china-esim-for-iphone-users-2026/): Which China eSIM actually works on iPhone? We compared Holafly, Nomad, Airalo, and AloSIM for data speed, price, and reliability in Beijing, Shanghai, and Guangzhou.
- [China Apps Checklist for Tourists: What to Download Before You Go](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-apps-checklist-tourists/): The essential apps every China traveler needs: Alipay, WeChat, DiDi, and tools that work without a VPN. A practical pre-departure checklist.
- [China Tourist Visa (L Visa) Application Guide 2026: Step by Step for US, UK, Canada, Australia & More](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-tourist-visa-application-guide-2026/): Complete 2026 guide to applying for a Chinese tourist visa — who needs one, documents required, application process, fees, processing times at Chinese visa centers worldwide, and how to avoid common rejection reasons.
- [China 240-Hour Visa-Free Transit 2026: Who Qualifies and How It Works](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-visa-free-transit-240-hour-guide/): The complete 240-hour visa-free transit guide for China. Which nationalities qualify, which airports you can use, and the exact rules you need to follow.
- [How to Use Chinese Public Toilets Without Panic: A Tourist Survival Guide](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-public-toilets-guide-foreigners/): A practical guide for foreign visitors on finding, using, and surviving public toilets in China with less stress and fewer surprises.
- [Guangzhou City Guide 2026: What Foreign Visitors Should Know](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/guangzhou-city-guide-2026-foreigners/): A practical Guangzhou city guide for foreign visitors in 2026, covering transport, neighborhoods, food, costs, weather, and common questions.
- [Chongqing City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/chongqing-city-guide-for-foreigners/): Plan your 2026 Chongqing trip with essential tips on transport, hotpot, top sights, local customs, and navigating China’s mountain megacity.
- [Guilin City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/guilin-city-guide-for-foreigners/): Plan your 2026 Guilin trip with tips on Li River cruises, Yangshuo, Longji Rice Terraces, local food, and practical travel essentials.
- [Guangzhou City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/guangzhou-city-guide-for-foreigners/): Plan your 2026 Guangzhou trip with essential tips on top sights, Cantonese food, metro travel, and practical advice for foreign visitors.
- [Nanjing City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/nanjing-city-guide-for-foreigners/): Plan your 2026 Nanjing trip with essential tips on sights, food, transport, nightlife, and practical advice for foreign visitors.
- [Xi'an City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/xian-city-guide-for-foreigners/): Plan your 2026 Xi'an trip with essential tips on top sights, local food, transport, and practical advice for foreign visitors.
- [What to Do If You Lose Your Passport in China: Emergency Guide for Tourists](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/lost-passport-china-emergency-guide-tourists/): Lost your passport in China? Follow clear emergency steps for police reports, embassy help, travel documents, and staying safe while you wait.

## Interactive Tools
- [China Survival Kit](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/survival-kit/): Use full-screen translation cards and saved checklists for arrival, restaurants, hotels, and local communication.
- [Show to Driver](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/show-to-driver/): Create a large Chinese address card for taxi drivers, hotel front desks, and asking directions on your phone.
- [Visa-Free & Transit Checker](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/visa-free-checker/): See if you can enter China visa-free, use 240-hour transit, or need to apply — by nationality.
- [Best Time to Visit China](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/best-time-to-visit/): See weather, crowds, and what to pack by city and month across major Chinese destinations.
- [Budget & Cash Estimator](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/budget-cash-estimator/): Estimate your total trip budget and how much cash to bring, by length, style, and city tier.
- [eSIM Plan Comparator](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/esim-comparison/): Compare data allowance, validity, price, and network across the top China travel eSIMs.
- [Payment Compatibility Checker](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/payment-checker/): Check if your card works with Alipay and WeChat Pay, plus limits and fees, by nationality.
- [Will My Apps Work in China?](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/app-availability-checker/): Check if Google, WhatsApp, Instagram and more work without a VPN — with a local alternative for each.
- [RMB Currency Converter](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/currency-converter/): Convert your currency to yuan and back, and see what everyday things cost in China.
- [Power Plug & Voltage Checker](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/power-plug-checker/): Find out if you need a plug adapter or voltage converter for China, based on your home country.
- [Clothing & Shoe Size Converter](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/clothing-size-converter/): Convert US, UK, and EU sizes to Chinese sizes for clothing and footwear before you shop.
- [Essential Chinese Phrases](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/essential-phrases/): A printable list of must-know Mandarin phrases with pinyin — payment, transport, food, and help.

## Editorial Scope
- General travel information only, not legal, immigration, medical, banking, emergency, or official government advice.
- Content is written for foreign visitors who need practical setup help before and during a China trip.
